title: The FDA’s peptide circus is underway.
summary: An advisory panel, stacked with RFK Jr.’s pro-peptide appointees, has voted to add BPC-157 and KPV to the bulk compounding list. Central to the argument is whether allowing compounding will curtail the gray market or expose the public to unnecessary risk.
caption: output/2026-07-23/the-fda-s-peptide-circus-is-underway.txt
